Direct xray mode использует тот же raw x: Direct xray mode uses the same raw xray.json only for traffic that has already entered xray through Windows system proxy or a manual proxy setting. xray TUN mode uses that raw xray.json as a true TUN path, so process/path rules from xray routing apply to system traffic.
Lumen KVN — уникальный туннель до любой: Lumen KVN is a unique tunnel to any country in the world, created by advanced world engineers (not what you think it is).
TCP ping быстрее всего; ICMP — системный: TCP ping is fastest; ICMP is system ping; real latency is HTTP through the server
Windows будет запрашивать повышенные пра: Windows will request elevated rights on next launch
Zapret запускает winws2.exe с выбранным: Zapret runs winws2.exe with the selected argument preset to bypass DPI throttling of YouTube, Discord, and other services. It works independently from VPN/proxy and requires administrator rights.
«Всё через VPN» отправляет весь трафик ч:
"All through VPN" sends all traffic through the server.
"My rules" uses your app, service, domain, and IP rules.
"No VPN by default" sends traffic directly except explicit exceptions.

Services:
"By preset" removes a manual service rule and lets the current preset decide again.
"Proxy" always routes the service through VPN/proxy, even when the general mode is direct.
"Direct" always routes the service directly, even when the general mode is "All through VPN".

Application rules work only in TUN mode.
Автоматически переподключаться при измен: Reconnect automatically when the network changes
Аргументы winws2, по одному на строку.\n:
winws2 arguments, one per line.
Lines starting with # are comments.
Быстрые переключатели для популярных сер: Quick switches for popular services (YouTube, Discord, etc.). "Off" means the service is not overridden.
Quick switches for popular services (YouTube, Discord, etc.). "By preset" does not override the service and follows the current routing mode.
Quick switches for popular services (YouTube, Discord, etc.). "By preset" removes the manual rule and returns the service to the current preset.
В режиме sing-box TUN правила процесса и: In sing-box TUN mode, process and path rules apply to intercepted system traffic. If the selected server cannot run as a native sing-box outbound, the app keeps this raw sing-box.json as the base and starts a local xray sidecar only for the proxy path.
В режиме системного прокси правила по пр: Application rules do not work in system proxy mode. Enable TUN to intercept application traffic.

Фрагментирование делит TLS-рукопожатие н: Splits the TLS handshake into parts. It can help bypass DPI, but may reduce stability on some servers.
Packets выбирает часть трафика, Length р: Packets selects the traffic part, Length sets fragment size, Delay sets the pause between fragments.
Мультиплексирование объединяет несколько: Multiplexing combines several requests into one channel. It can speed up many small connections, but depends on server support.
Потоки задают, сколько запросов можно ве: Streams define how many requests can run inside one multiplexed connection.
DNS:\nСистемный DNS — домены резолвит Wi:
DNS:
System DNS — domains are resolved by Windows or the app itself.
Built-in DNS — DNS goes through Lumen/sing-box and follows direct/proxy/fake DNS rules.

The behavior section below shows what will go through VPN/proxy, direct, or by the current preset.
Поведение:\n«Всё через VPN» отправляет в:
Behavior:
"Everything through VPN" sends all traffic through the server.
"My rules" uses your app, service, domain, and IP rules.
"No VPN by default" sends traffic directly except explicit exceptions.

Services:
"By preset" removes the manual rule and lets the current preset decide again.
"Proxy" always sends the service through VPN/proxy, even when the global mode is direct.
"Direct" always sends the service directly, even when the global mode is "Everything through VPN".

Application rules work only in TUN mode.
DNS:\nСистемный DNS — домены резолвит Wi:
DNS:
System DNS — domains are resolved by Windows or the app itself.
Built-in DNS — DNS goes through Lumen/sing-box and follows direct/proxy/fake DNS rules.
